zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Thorne Esq於1422年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Sir Degorie Robert Thorne21歲，母親Cecilia Young16歲。他於大約1446年與Mary Corbet在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1452年在英國史洛普爾享年30歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Thorne Esq was born in 1422, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Degorie Robert Thorne, was 21 and his mother, Cecilia Young, was 16. He married Mary Corbet about 1446, in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1452, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Thorne Esq est né en 1422, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Degorie Robert Thorne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Young, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Mary Corbet environ 1446, à Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1452, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre.

ko.Shelvock, Ruyton-XI-Towns, Shropshire Un: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루이턴 스이 타운스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Thorne Esq(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Degorie Robert Thorne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Young(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 갬스턴에서 Mary Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1452년 영국 슈럽실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

ru.Shelvock, Ruyton-XI-Towns, Shropshire Un: руитон кси тоунс, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Thorne Esq родился в 1422 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Degorie Robert Thorne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Young, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Corbet около 1446 г. в местности гамстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1452 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия.
